title: A pilot sample of Planck-selected strongly lensed sub-mm galaxies: NOEMA observations and physical characterisation
comment: 16 pages, 8 figures, accepted for publication in Sect. 4. Extragalactic astronomy, Astronomy and Astrophysics (A&A)
summary: The extreme brightness of high-$z$ strongly lensed galaxies detected by Planck surveys, thanks to their exceptionally large gravitational magnifications, offers a unique opportunity to investigate in extraordinary detail their structure and kinematics during their active star-formation phase. As a step in this direction, we present and analyse NOEMA imaging and spectroscopic data for four lensed high-z galaxy candidates. We performed continuum and line imaging of the sources at 2 and 3 mm bands down to $1''.2$ spatial resolution and 40 $\rm{km}\,{\rm s}^{-1}$ spectral resolution, reconstructed and fitted the line profiles, and produced moment maps of the line emission to investigate the spatial distribution and kinematics of the molecular gas. We also carried out the gravitational lens modelling for one of the sources. The continuum images showed multiple components for at least two of the sources, strongly supporting the strong lensing scenario. We detected with high S/N ratios two CO lines for all sources, at CO(3-2), CO(4-3) and CO(5-4) transitions; for one source, we also detected the [CI](1-0) line. We derived accurate spectroscopic redshifts $2.3 \lesssim z \lesssim 3.3$, with $1σ$ uncertainties $δz \approx 10^{-4}$ in redshift. All four sources lie well above the CO line luminosity-linewidth relation for unlensed galaxies, providing independent confirmation of their strongly lensed nature. Three sources exhibit broad (FWHM$\gtrsim 400\,{\rm km}\,{\rm s}^{-1}$), double-peaked line profiles and substantial velocity gradients, while the last one shows relatively narrow, single-peaked lines and no detectable velocity gradients, possibly indicating a nearly face-on geometry or intrinsically simple kinematics.

AI.tldr: 本文利用NOEMA望远镜对Planck探测到的四个强引力透镜高红移星系候选体进行了成像和光谱分析，通过连续谱和CO谱线观测确认了其强透镜性质，测定了精确红移（z~2.3-3.3），并揭示了其分子气体分布与运动学特征。
AI.motivation: 强引力透镜效应使高红移星系被极大增亮，为精细研究早期活跃恒星形成阶段星系的结构和运动学提供了独特机会。本研究旨在利用这一优势，对四个透镜候选体进行高分辨率观测与分析。
AI.method: 利用NOEMA在2mm和3mm波段进行连续谱和谱线成像（空间分辨率1.2角秒，光谱分辨率40 km/s），重建并拟合谱线轮廓，生成矩图分析分子气体分布与运动学；对其中一个源进行了引力透镜建模。
AI.result: 至少两个源在连续谱中显示多成分结构，支持强透镜场景；所有源均在高信噪比下探测到CO(3-2)、(4-3)、(5-4)跃迁，一个源还探测到[CI](1-0)线；精确红移范围2.3<z<3.3，误差约10^-4；所有源均偏离未透镜星系的CO光度-线宽关系，确认了强透镜性质；三个源呈现宽双峰谱线轮廓和显著速度梯度，一个源为窄单峰轮廓且无速度梯度。
AI.conclusion: 成功确认了四个高红移星系的强透镜性质，并揭示了其分子气体运动学多样性——多数源存在复杂动力学结构（可能为旋转盘或合并系统），而一个源可能为近正面朝向或运动学简单系统。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 由于普朗克巡天探测到的高红移强引力透镜星系具有异常大的引力放大倍数，其极端亮度为研究它们在活跃恒星形成阶段的结构和运动学提供了独特的机会。作为这一方向的一步，我们展示并分析了四个透镜高红移星系候选体的NOEMA成像和光谱数据。我们在2毫米和3毫米波段对源进行了连续谱和谱线成像，空间分辨率达到1.2角秒，光谱分辨率达到40 km/s，重建并拟合了谱线轮廓，生成了谱线发射的矩图以研究分子气体的空间分布和运动学。我们还对其中一个源进行了引力透镜建模。连续谱图像显示至少两个源具有多个成分，强烈支持强透镜场景。我们以高信噪比检测了所有源的CO(3-2)、CO(4-3)和CO(5-4)跃迁的两条CO谱线；对于一个源，我们还检测了[CI](1-0)谱线。我们推导了精确的光谱红移2.3 ≲ z ≲ 3.3，红移的1σ不确定度为δz ≈ 10^{-4}。所有四个源都远高于未透镜星系的CO谱线光度-线宽关系，独立证实了它们的强透镜性质。三个源表现出宽（FWHM ≳ 400 km/s）、双峰谱线轮廓和显著的速度梯度，而最后一个源显示出相对较窄的单峰谱线且无可检测的速度梯度，可能表明近乎正面朝向的几何结构或内在简单的运动学。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，成功确认了四个高红移星系的强透镜性质，并揭示了其分子气体运动学多样性——多数源存在复杂动力学结构（可能为旋转盘或合并系统），而一个源可能为近正面朝向或运动学简单系统。

title: Cosmic CORALS: Timing the Universe with high-z star clusters
comment: 12 pages, 8 figures, 1 table. Submitted to A&A
summary: In this work, we explore the potential of anchoring the age-redshift relation across cosmic time by probing the oldest star clusters at high redshift, now observed thanks to the James Webb Space Telescope in strongly lensed fields. As a case study, we consider one of the highest-redshift systems observed, the Cosmic Gems arc at $z=9.625$. We perform image deconvolution of multi-band JWST imaging, identifying a total of 20 point sources along the arc. We derive the stellar ages through a cosmology-independent spectral energy distribution (SED) fitting framework, ensuring that these measurements can be used as unbiased cosmological anchors. By combining these high-z systems with state-of-the-art local globular cluster ages, we perform a joint Bayesian fit to the age-redshift relation in a flat $Λ$CDM model, measuring $H_0=70^{+27}_{-16}\ \rm{km\ s^{-1}\ Mpc^{-1}}$ and $Ω_m=0.33^{+0.37}_{-0.21}$. While these constraints are still loose, we show that the slope of the degeneracy, a power-law in the $Ω_m - H_0$ plane, is highly dependent on the redshift of the sources, becoming shallower as redshift increases. Leveraging this geometric rotation, we present forecasts showing that a future sample of $\sim 300$ lensed proto-globular clusters well-distributed up to $z \approx 10$ could tighten the statistical precision to $4\%$ on $H_0$ and $11\%$ on $Ω_m$, competitive with and independent of methods currently in use. The present work, therefore, represents a new avenue in cosmology and comes at a timely moment, when JWST observes high-redshift lensed star clusters routinely, Euclid and the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope uncover new strong lensing fields, and close to the start of operation of the ESO Extremely Large Telescope.

AI.tldr: 本文利用JWST在高红移（z=9.625）透镜星系中发现的古老星团，通过宇宙学无关的SED拟合得到星族年龄，再结合本地球状星团年龄，对平坦ΛCDM模型进行贝叶斯拟合，测得H₀=70⁺²⁷₋₁₆ km/s/Mpc和Ωₘ=0.33⁺⁰.³⁷₋₀.₂₁。研究表明，未来约300个透镜原球状星团样本可将H₀精度提升至4%，Ωₘ精度提升至11%，提供了一种独立于现有方法的宇宙学新途径。
AI.motivation: 探索利用高红移古老星团锚定宇宙年龄-红移关系的潜力，建立一种独立于传统方法的宇宙学参数测量新途径，以缓解当前宇宙学测量中的H₀张力等问题。
AI.method: 对JWST多波段图像进行去卷积处理，识别出20个点源；采用宇宙学无关的SED拟合框架推导星族年龄；结合本地球状星团年龄，在平坦ΛCDM模型下对年龄-红移关系进行联合贝叶斯拟合，并利用几何旋转特性对未来样本精度进行预测。
AI.result: 当前测得H₀=70⁺²⁷₋₁₆ km/s/Mpc，Ωₘ=0.33⁺⁰.³⁷₋₀.₂₁；发现Ωₘ-H₀平面的简并斜率高度依赖红移，高红移源使斜率变浅；预测约300个分布于z≈10以内的透镜星团可将H₀精度提升至4%，Ωₘ精度提升至11%。
AI.conclusion: 利用JWST发现的高红移透镜星团作为宇宙学锚点是一种可行且前景广阔的新方法，未来与Euclid、Roman望远镜及ELT等设施的协同观测有望获得与现有方法竞争甚至更优的精度。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们探索了通过探测高红移处最古老的星团来锚定宇宙时间年龄-红移关系的潜力，这些星团现在得益于詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜在强透镜场中的观测。作为案例研究，我们考虑了观测到的最高红移系统之一，即位于$z=9.625$的宇宙宝石弧。我们对多波段JWST图像进行反卷积，识别出沿弧分布的共20个点源。我们通过一个与宇宙学无关的光谱能量分布（SED）拟合框架推导出恒星年龄，确保这些测量结果可用作无偏的宇宙学锚点。通过将这些高红移系统与最先进的本地球状星团年龄相结合，我们在平坦$Λ$CDM模型中对年龄-红移关系进行联合贝叶斯拟合，测量得到$H_0=70^{+27}_{-16}\ \rm{km\ s^{-1}\ Mpc^{-1}}$和$Ω_m=0.33^{+0.37}_{-0.21}$。虽然这些约束仍然宽松，但我们表明，在$Ω_m - H_0$平面中，简并性的斜率（呈幂律关系）高度依赖于源的红移，随着红移增加而变缓。利用这种几何旋转，我们提出了预测，表明未来一个包含约300个透镜原球状星团、在红移高达$z \approx 10$范围内良好分布的样本，可以将$H_0$的统计精度收紧至$4\%$，将$Ω_m$的统计精度收紧至$11\%$，与当前使用的方法相比具有竞争力且独立。因此，当前工作代表了宇宙学的一条新途径，并且正值一个及时的时刻：JWST常规观测高红移透镜星团，Euclid和南希·格雷斯·罗曼空间望远镜发现新的强透镜场，且ESO极大望远镜即将开始运行。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要：利用JWST发现的高红移透镜星团作为宇宙学锚点是一种可行且前景广阔的新方法，未来与Euclid、Roman望远镜及ELT等设施的协同观测有望获得与现有方法竞争甚至更优的精度。

title: Vz-GAL Dusty Star-Forming Galaxies: Revisiting the CO-H2 Conversion Factor Tension
summary: The CO luminosity-to-H$_2$ mass conversion factor ($α_{CO}$) remains a debated uncertainty in determining molecular gas masses of high-redshift dusty star-forming galaxies (DSFGs). Dynamical mass constraints have often favored $α_{CO}=0.8$~$M_{\odot}~{(K~km~{s}^{-1}~{pc}^{2})}^{-1}$, whereas dust- and radiative-transfer-based methods imply higher values. We revisit this ``tension" using the largest homogeneous sample of 21 unlensed $z\sim1-4$ DSFGs, with securely measured \coonezero luminosities from the VLA \vzgal survey and resolved ($\sim{0.1}^{\prime\prime}$) ALMA 1~mm dust continuum imaging. For 12 galaxies with robust modeling constraints, we derive molecular gas masses using dust spectral energy distribution modeling and the TUNER LVG framework, adopting a solar-metallicity gas-to-dust mass ratio of 100. Although not fully independent due to shared assumptions on dust properties, these approaches yield mutually consistent gas masses corresponding to $α_{CO}\sim1.5-11.5$, with a median near the Galactic $α_{CO}=4.3$. Isotropic virial dynamical masses agree with these gas masses when realistic molecular gas sizes are adopted, while our proposed ``mixed" (rotating, pressure-supported, thick-disk) estimator systematically underestimates dynamical masses, producing low $α_{CO}$ limits. Using GN20 ($z=4.055$) as a case study, we show that resolved gas geometry and kinematics reconcile the discrepancy with LVG-derived $α_{CO}$. Our results suggest that current data do not require $α_{CO}=0.8$, and intermediate to near-Galactic values remain dynamically viable given uncertainties in gas geometry, dust properties, and gas-to-dust ratios. Further progress in calibrating $α_{CO}$ in the early universe will require resolved molecular gas observations, physically motivated ISM modeling, and stringent constraints on dust properties.

artifacts.abstract_zh: CO光度与H₂质量转换因子（α_CO）仍是确定高红移尘埃恒星形成星系（DSFGs）分子气体质量的一个有争议的不确定因素。动力学质量约束通常倾向于α_CO=0.8 M⊙ (K km s⁻¹ pc²)⁻¹，而基于尘埃和辐射传输的方法则暗示更高的值。我们利用来自VLA Vz-GAL巡天的21个无透镜z~1-4 DSFGs的最大均匀样本（具有可靠测量的CO(1-0)光度）以及分辨（~0.1″）的ALMA 1 mm尘埃连续谱成像，重新审视了这一“张力”。对于12个具有稳健建模约束的星系，我们采用尘埃光谱能量分布建模和TUNER LVG框架推导分子气体质量，并采用太阳金属丰度的气尘质量比100。尽管由于共享尘埃性质假设而并非完全独立，这些方法得出了相互一致的气体质量，对应α_CO~1.5-11.5，中值接近银河系值α_CO=4.3。当采用现实的分子气体尺度时，各向同性维里动力学质量与这些气体质量一致，而我们提出的“混合”（旋转、压力支撑、厚盘）估计器则系统性地低估了动力学质量，产生较低的α_CO上限。以GN20（z=4.055）为例，我们展示了分辨的气体几何和运动学如何调和了与LVG推导的α_CO之间的差异。我们的结果表明，当前数据不要求α_CO=0.8，并且考虑到气体几何、尘埃特性和气尘比的不确定性，中间值到近银河系值在动力学上仍然是可行的。进一步校准早期宇宙中α_CO的进展将需要分辨的分子气体观测、物理驱动的ISM建模以及对尘埃性质的严格约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：当前数据不要求α_CO=0.8，中间值到近银河系值在考虑气体几何、尘埃特性和气尘比的不确定性后仍然是动力学可行的。未来需通过分辨分子气体观测、物理驱动的ISM建模以及对尘埃性质的严格约束来进一步校准早期宇宙的α_CO。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Left panel: Observed major and minor axes of the targets using ALMA 1 mm observations. Right panel: Dust inclination angle distribution of the sources as compared to their derived dust sizes. The median inclination angle is consistent with that expected for randomly oriented disks in the sky, corresponding to \(\langle{i}\rangle=1\) ( \(i={57.3}^{\circ}\) ) or \(\langle{{sin}^{2}(i)}\rangle=2/3\) ( \(i={54.7}^{\circ}\) ). These values should not be confused with the commonly adopted average inclination factor using \(\langle{{sin}(i)}\rangle=\pi/4\simeq 0.79\) , used in earlier studies (e.g., Neri et al. , 2003 ; Bothwell et al. , 2013 ) ; see Appendix VII.4 for further discussion.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：左图：使用ALMA 1 mm观测得到的目标观测长轴和短轴。右图：源的尘埃倾角分布与其推导的尘埃尺度比较。中值倾角与随机取向盘在天空中的预期一致，对应\(\langle{i}\rangle=1\)（\(i={57.3}^{\circ}\)）或\(\langle{{sin}^{2}(i)}\rangle=2/3\)（\(i={54.7}^{\circ}\)）。这些值不应与早期研究中常用的平均倾角因子\(\langle{{sin}(i)}\rangle=\pi/4\simeq 0.79\)混淆（例如，Neri et al., 2003；Bothwell et al., 2013）；详见附录VII.4。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Correlation between inclination angle and ellipticity of a disk. Both parameters depend on the observed axis ratio ‘q’. Left panel: Variation in inclination-angle contribution to the dynamical mass ( \(M_{dyn}\) ) — via \({sin}^{-2}(i)\) factor (Bothwell et al. , 2013 , Eqn. 8 ) — with assumed intrinsic thickness ( \(q_{0}\) ) of the disk. For all \(q_{0}\) values and near face-on systems, a steeper increase in observed inclination angles is expected with a smaller rise in ellipticity. Right panel: A specific case of \(q_{0}=0.2\) , as assumed in this work. Derived inclination angles are sensitive to the measured dust axis ratio, not the major axis alone.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：盘倾角与椭圆度之间的相关性。两个参数都依赖于观测轴比‘q’。左图：倾角对动力学质量（\(M_{dyn}\)）的贡献变化——通过\({sin}^{-2}(i)\)因子（Bothwell et al., 2013，方程8）——与假设的盘固有厚度（\(q_{0}\)）的关系。对于所有\(q_{0}\)值和近正面系统，预期观测倾角会随着椭圆度的较小增加而更陡地增加。右图：\(q_{0}=0.2\)的特例，如本工作所假设。推导的倾角对测量的尘埃轴比敏感，而不仅仅是长轴。

title: A Rest-frame K-band View of Bulge Growth in Massive Dusty Star-forming Galaxies at z~2
comment: See Figure 4 for the key result that the stacked F770W and ALMA 870 micron profiles agree closely out to 8 kpc. Comments are welcome. Submitted to ApJ
summary: We study bulge formation in 16 massive dusty star-forming galaxies at z~2 by combining JWST MIRI F770W imaging, NIRCam imaging in eight bands, and ALMA 870 um data. At the median redshift of z=2.18, the F770W band probes the rest-frame 2.4 um light, close to the rest-frame K band, and traces the stellar mass distribution with little effect from dust attenuation. The effective radii measured in F770W agree with those of the 870 um dust emission, with a median ratio of 0.95, and are typically 23% smaller than those in F444W. The rest-frame K-band imaging is therefore essential to measure the true extent of the stellar mass, which is as compact as the dusty star-forming regions. In stacks of the 16 galaxies at a matched resolution, the 870 um and F770W profiles agree closely out to 8 kpc, and a bulge plus disk decomposition of the F770W stack gives a bulge-to-total ratio of 0.50. Fitting the SEDs in radial bins with CIGALE, we find that the attenuation decreases from Av=2.6 mag at the center to 1.5 mag at $r\gtrsim7$ kpc, while the specific star formation rate profile is flat. In these galaxies the bulge is already in place, and the whole system grows toward compact quiescent galaxies within about 1 Gyr. In two galaxies, by contrast, the 870 um emission is 3 to 6 times more compact than the F770W light, which suggests that they are still in the bulge-building compaction phase. Our sample may thus catch massive galaxies in several phases of bulge formation.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用JWST和ALMA数据，分析了红移z~2的16个巨大尘埃星暴星系中的核球形成过程。发现静止帧K波段（F770W）与870微米尘埃辐射的尺度高度一致，核球占总质量比约50%，并且系统在约10亿年内向致密静止星系演化。
AI.motivation: 理解高红移（z~2）大质量尘埃星暴星系中核球结构的形成机制，探究它们如何演化为致密的静止星系。
AI.method: 结合JWST MIRI F770W成像、NIRCam八个波段数据以及ALMA 870微米数据，对16个星系进行结构分解（核球-盘）、径向SED拟合（CIGALE）和堆叠分析。
AI.result: 1）F770W有效半径与870微米辐射尺度高度一致（中位数比值0.95），比F444W测得的半径小23%；2）堆叠分析显示核球-盘分解得到核球占比0.50；3）消光从中心Av=2.6 mag降至外围1.5 mag，比恒星形成率剖面平坦；4）两个星系的870微米比F770W紧凑3-6倍，处于核球形成压实阶段。
AI.conclusion: 这些星系正处于核球形成的不同阶段：多数星系核球已形成，将在大约10亿年内演化为致密静止星系；少数星系仍处于核球形成的压实阶段。静止帧K波段成像对测量恒星质量真实分布至关重要。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们通过结合JWST MIRI F770W成像、八个波段的NIRCam成像以及ALMA 870微米数据，研究了红移z~2处16个大规模尘埃恒星形成星系的核球形成。在z=2.18的中位红移处，F770W波段探测静止帧2.4微米光，接近静止帧K波段，并且几乎不受尘埃消光影响地追踪恒星质量分布。在F770W中测量的有效半径与870微米尘埃发射的有效半径一致，中位比值为0.95，并且通常比F444W中的有效半径小23%。因此，静止帧K波段成像对于测量恒星质量的真实范围至关重要，该范围与尘埃恒星形成区域一样致密。在匹配分辨率下对这16个星系的叠加中，870微米和F770W的轮廓在8千秒差距内紧密吻合，对F770W叠加的核球加盘分解给出了核球与总体的比值为0.50。使用CIGALE对径向分箱的SED进行拟合，我们发现消光从中心的A_V=2.6星等下降到r≳7千秒差距处的1.5星等，而比恒星形成率轮廓是平坦的。在这些星系中，核球已经就位，整个系统在大约10亿年内向致密静止星系演化。相比之下，在两个星系中，870微米发射的致密程度是F770W光的3到6倍，这表明它们仍处于核球形成的压实阶段。因此，我们的样本可能捕捉到了处于核球形成几个阶段的大质量星系。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这些星系正处于核球形成的不同阶段：多数星系核球已形成，将在大约10亿年内演化为致密静止星系；少数星系仍处于核球形成的压实阶段。静止帧K波段成像对测量恒星质量真实分布至关重要。

title: Microlensing of Microlensing: Effects of Random Stars on the Double-Source-Plane Gravitational Lens
summary: Microlensing, the influence of stars within a galactic gravitational lens, has emerged as a powerful probe of compact mass and, through differential magnification, sub-parsec scale sources at cosmological distances. The recent discovery of a double-source-plane gravitational lens system in which the most distant source is a quasar offers the prospect of compound microlensing, in which quasar light rays are influenced by compact masses within the two foreground lensing galaxies. Here, we present the first numerical simulations of this "microlensing of microlensing". We consider the recently discovered "Einstein zig-zag" lens, J1721+8842, as a fiducial case, and construct microlensing magnification maps for each of the six quasar images in this system. Due to the secondary microlensing effects of the myriad of initial microimages, the resulting maps contain more complex caustic features than seen in the case of single plane microlensing. This is reflected in the expected lightcurves seen for each of the images.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对双源平面引力透镜系统中的“复合微引力透镜效应”（微引力透镜的微引力透镜）进行了数值模拟，以J1721+8842系统为例，发现次级微透镜效应会产生更复杂的焦散结构，并影响各像的光变曲线。

title: Rapid growth in a dual AGN during a gas-rich merger at z~4.5
summary: The late stages of galaxy mergers - when two supermassive black holes (SMBHs) reach kiloparsec-scale separations - represent a critical phase for understanding SMBH growth, galaxy co-evolution, and the progenitors of low-frequency gravitational waves. Yet confirmed close-separation (<3 kpc) dual active galactic nuclei (AGNs) remain confined to the local Universe, despite predictions that such systems should be common in the merger-rich early Universe. Here we report the discovery of LID-1166, a dual AGN with a projected separation of ~1.5 kpc at z~4.5, representing the first such system known beyond the local Universe. Spatially resolved JWST/NIRSpec integral-field spectroscopy reveals two spatially and kinematically distinct narrow-line emission components with a line-of-sight velocity offset of ~ -164 km/s. Both components additionally exhibit broad Ha emission, including a compact off-nuclei broad Ha component associated with the companion source, confirming two actively accreting SMBHs. Independent ALMA [CII] 158 um observations reveal corresponding spatially and kinematically distinct cold gas components associated with the same nuclei, demonstrating that the system is a gas-rich merger. While undergoing super-Eddington accretion during a late-stage merger, the SMBHs already lie on the local black hole-host mass relation for massive elliptical galaxies within the uncertainties, suggesting that rapid, obscured growth may help establish this relation early in cosmic history. LID-1166 reveals a previously hidden phase of SMBH growth and points to a missing population of heavily obscured, merger-driven dual AGNs at high redshift.

AI.tldr: 在红移z~4.5处发现了一对距离仅1.5 kpc的双活动星系核（LID-1166），这是首个超出局域宇宙的近距离双AGN系统，通过JWST和ALMA证实了两个正在活跃吸积的超大质量黑洞，揭示了早期宇宙中隐藏的并合驱动双AGN群体。
AI.motivation: 尽管理论预测早期宇宙中存在大量并合事件驱动的双活动星系核，但迄今确认的近距离（<3 kpc）双AGN仅限于局域宇宙，缺乏高红移样本，限制了我们对超大质量黑洞增长和星系协同演化的理解。
AI.method: 利用JWST/NIRSpec积分场光谱获取空间分辨的窄线和宽Hα发射线成分，结合ALMA [CII] 158 μm观测冷气体分布，通过空间和运动学特征确认双AGN存在并测量投影距离~1.5 kpc、视线速度差~ -164 km/s。
AI.result: 发现红移z~4.5处的双AGN系统LID-1166，投影分离~1.5 kpc，具有两个空间和运动学上截然不同的窄线成分及宽Hα成分，ALMA数据证实了对应双核的冷气体成分，表明其为富含气体的晚期并合系统。
AI.conclusion: 该发现揭示了早期宇宙中超大质量黑洞快速增长的一个此前隐藏的阶段，表明快速、被遮蔽的增长可能有助于早期宇宙中建立本地黑洞-宿主星系质量关系，并预示着高红移存在大量被严重遮蔽、并合驱动的双AGN缺失群体。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系并合的晚期阶段——当两个超大质量黑洞（SMBHs）达到千秒差距尺度的分离时——是理解SMBH增长、星系共同演化以及低频引力波前身的关键阶段。然而，已确认的近距离分离（<3 kpc）双活动星系核（AGNs）仍局限于本地宇宙，尽管预测此类系统在并合频繁的早期宇宙中应很常见。本文报告了LID-1166的发现，这是一个投影分离约1.5 kpc、红移z~4.5的双AGN，代表了已知的本地宇宙之外首个此类系统。空间分辨的JWST/NIRSpec积分场光谱揭示了两个空间和运动学上截然不同的窄线发射成分，其视线速度偏移约-164 km/s。两个成分还均展现出宽的Hα发射，包括与伴源相关的一个致密核外宽Hα成分，证实了两个正在活跃吸积的SMBHs。独立的ALMA [CII] 158 μm观测揭示了与同一核对应的空间和运动学上截然不同的冷气体成分，表明该系统是一个富含气体的并合。在晚期并合过程中经历超爱丁顿吸积的同时，这些SMBHs在误差范围内已位于本地椭圆星系的黑洞-宿主星系质量关系上，表明快速、被遮蔽的增长可能有助于在宇宙早期建立这一关系。LID-1166揭示了SMBH增长的一个此前隐藏的阶段，并指向高红移处大量被严重遮蔽、并合驱动的双AGN缺失群体。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：该发现揭示了早期宇宙中超大质量黑洞快速增长的一个此前隐藏的阶段，表明快速、被遮蔽的增长可能有助于早期宇宙中建立本地黑洞-宿主星系质量关系，并预示着高红移存在大量被严重遮蔽、并合驱动的双AGN缺失群体。

title: ALMA CO-CAVITY II. Resolved Scaling Relations in Void Galaxies
comment: 21 pages, 14 figures. Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: Scaling relations involving star formation rates (SFRs), molecular gas mass, and stellar mass are key to understand galaxy evolution, and have previously been explored at resolved scales. However, they have not been examined with particular emphasis on the large-scale environments (LSEs). In this work, we study the resolved Schmidt-Kennicutt relation (rSK), molecular gas main sequence (rMGMS) and star-forming main sequence (rSFMS) from a sample of 41 void galaxies (VGs) residing in the least dense regions of the Universe. Using high-resolution interferometric CO(1-0) data and optical IFU data from the ALMA CO-CAVITY and CAVITY surveys at scales of 2.5" (0.8-2.1 kpc), we study these relations for the full sample as well as for individual galaxies in voids. We fit the relations, finding a similar parametrisation as that used for galaxies from all LSEs. However, the rMGMS is the tightest of the three relations ($σ_{rMGMS}=0.16$ dex, $σ_{rSK}=0.21$ dex, and $σ_{rSFMS}=0.24$ dex), unlike in other samples. We find that a large source of deviations in the relations comes from galaxy-to-galaxy variations. However, the rMGMS is less affected by these variations. It has been suggested that the rMGMS arises from the concentration of molecular gas within the gravitational potential set by the stellar content and dark matter. We hypothesise that deviations from the rMGMS trace changes in the gravitational potential occurring on longer time-scales, whereas deviations in the rSK and the rSFMS are driven by more rapid variations in the SFR. This distinction is particularly relevant for our sample of VGs because the 41 ALMA CO-CAVITY VGs are more isolated than galaxies in other LSEs, and therefore are less affected by events that can significantly alter the gas distribution or trigger SF on short time-scales. In this sense, the rMGMS is likely the most stable of these relations over time.

AI.tldr: 本文利用ALMA CO-CAVITY和CAVITY巡天的数据，研究了41个宇宙空洞星系（VGs）在分辨尺度上的三类标度关系：Schmidt-Kennicutt关系（rSK）、分子气体主序（rMGMS）和恒星形成主序（rSFMS）。研究发现，rMGMS是三者中最紧密的关系（σ=0.16 dex），且受星系间变化影响最小。作者认为rMGMS的偏差反映了引力势的长期变化，而rSK和rSFMS的偏差则由恒星形成速率的短期波动驱动，这一特性在孤立空洞星系中尤为显著。
AI.motivation: 此前关于星系标度关系的研究多集中于整体环境，而宇宙空洞（大尺度低密度区域）中的星系尚未被系统研究。本文旨在填补这一空白，探究在极端孤立环境下，恒星形成率、分子气体质量与恒星质量之间的分辨尺度关系是否发生变化。
AI.method: 从ALMA CO-CAVITY和CAVITY巡天中选取41个空洞星系，利用高分辨率干涉CO(1-0)数据和光学IFU数据，在2.5角秒（0.8-2.1 kpc）尺度上拟合三类分辨尺度关系（rSK、rMGMS、rSFMS），并分析其离散度及星系间变化的影响。
AI.result: 三类关系中，rMGMS最为紧密（σ=0.16 dex），远超rSK（0.21 dex）和rSFMS（0.24 dex）。星系间变化是偏差的主要来源，但rMGMS受其影响最小。空洞星系的关系参数化与其它环境星系相似。
AI.conclusion: rMGMS可能是在时间尺度上最稳定的标度关系，因为其偏差反映的是恒星成分与暗物质所设定的引力势的长期变化；而rSK和rSFMS的偏差则受恒星形成速率短期波动的主导。空洞星系的孤立性使其更少受短时标事件干扰，从而凸显了rMGMS的稳定性。

recommendation.reason: 论文聚焦于空洞星系中的分子气体与恒星形成标度关系，使用ALMA CO(1-0)数据，与用户兴趣中的ALMA、分子气体、恒星形成率、暗物质等关键词高度匹配。但研究主题为空洞星系环境，而非用户核心的强引力透镜或高红移星系动力学，且无核心作者参与，因此评分适中。
recommendation.topic_fit: 论文研究空洞星系中的分子气体与恒星形成标度关系，与用户兴趣中的分子气体、恒星形成率、暗物质等关键词匹配，但未涉及强引力透镜或高红移星系动力学，主题契合度一般。
recommendation.method_fit: 使用ALMA高分辨率干涉CO(1-0)数据和光学IFU数据，与用户兴趣中的ALMA观测方法一致，但方法本身为常规的标度关系拟合，无特殊创新。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 涉及恒星形成率（SFR）、分子气体质量和恒星质量的标度关系是理解星系演化的关键，此前已在分辨尺度上进行了探索。然而，这些关系尚未特别针对大尺度环境（LSEs）进行过研究。在这项工作中，我们利用一个由41个位于宇宙最不密集区域的空洞星系（VGs）组成的样本，研究了分辨的施密特-肯尼卡特关系（rSK）、分子气体主序（rMGMS）和恒星形成主序（rSFMS）。利用来自ALMA CO-CAVITY和CAVITY巡天的高分辨率干涉CO(1-0)数据和光学IFU数据（尺度为2.5角秒，对应0.8-2.1千秒差距），我们针对整个样本以及空洞中的单个星系研究了这些关系。我们对这些关系进行了拟合，发现其参数化形式与用于所有大尺度环境星系的相似。然而，rMGMS是这三个关系中最紧密的（σ_rMGMS=0.16 dex，σ_rSK=0.21 dex，σ_rSFMS=0.24 dex），这与其他样本不同。我们发现，这些关系偏差的一个主要来源是星系间的差异。然而，rMGMS受这些差异的影响较小。已有研究表明，rMGMS源于分子气体在由恒星成分和暗物质设定的引力势内的聚集。我们假设，rMGMS的偏差追踪了在更长时间尺度上发生的引力势变化，而rSK和rSFMS的偏差则由恒星形成速率的更快速变化驱动。这种区别对于我们样本中的空洞星系尤其相关，因为41个ALMA CO-CAVITY空洞星系比其他大尺度环境中的星系更孤立，因此受那些能在短时间尺度上显著改变气体分布或触发恒星形成的事件影响较小。从这个意义上说，rMGMS很可能是这些关系中随时间最稳定的。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：rMGMS可能是在时间尺度上最稳定的标度关系，因为其偏差反映的是恒星成分与暗物质所设定的引力势的长期变化；而rSK和rSFMS的偏差则受恒星形成速率短期波动的主导。空洞星系的孤立性使其更少受短时标事件干扰，从而凸显了rMGMS的稳定性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Resolved SRs for the 41 ALMA CO-CAVITY galaxies. We show the distribution of 7 937 detected pixels with the filled contours: (left) in red for the rSK, (mid) in purple for the rMGMS, and (right) in blue for the rSFMS. In each panel, we show in the lower-left corner the median of the error bars. The orthogonal distance regression (ODR) fit results are shown in the upper-left legend of each panel and are represented by the solid lines, with the 1 \(\sigma\) ODR scatter depicted by the shadowed region around the regression. In the case of the rSK, we also show the equivalent slopes for depletion times at 0.1, 1.0, 2.0, and 10.0 Gyr, with black dotted and dashed lines. For comparison, we added the fits of ALMaQUEST XI (Ellison et al. , 2024 ) full sample and EDGE-CALIFA (Sánchez et al. , 2021 ) detected sample, with the green dashed and magenta dash-dotted lines, respectively. Note that the contours show levels of inclusion of pixels of 5, 10, 20, 50 and 80%.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：41个ALMA CO-CAVITY星系的分辨标度关系。我们展示了7937个检测像素的分布，使用填充等高线表示：（左）红色为rSK，（中）紫色为rMGMS，（右）蓝色为rSFMS。在每个面板的左下角，我们显示了误差棒的中位数。正交距离回归（ODR）拟合结果显示在每个面板的左上角图例中，并用实线表示，回归线周围的阴影区域表示1 \(\sigma\) ODR散布。对于rSK，我们还展示了耗竭时间在0.1、1.0、2.0和10.0 Gyr时的等效斜率，用黑色虚线和点线表示。作为比较，我们添加了ALMaQUEST XI（Ellison et al. , 2024）全样本和EDGE-CALIFA（Sánchez et al. , 2021）检测样本的拟合结果，分别用绿色虚线和洋红色点划线表示。注意，等高线显示了像素包含水平为5%、10%、20%、50%和80%。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Linear-fit parameters to the resolved SRs for the samples of detected pixels of this work (ODR fits), ALMaQUEST XI (Ellison et al. , 2024 ) , and EDGE-CALIFA (Sánchez et al. , 2021 ) . 6 6 6 For each survey we converted the parameters to \(yr^{-1}\) and \(pc^{-2}\) units, and to Chabrier IMF. In the case of ALMaQUEST XI, we show the parameters for the fit applied to the full sample (FS), to the control sample (CS), and to the central starburst sample (SB). † In the last column, the dagger symbols show the relation with the lowest scatter for each survey/sample. Note that the fits from EDGE-CALIFA are not obtained using the ODR fitting procedure used in this work and ALMaQUEST XI.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本工作（ODR拟合）、ALMaQUEST XI（Ellison et al. , 2024）和EDGE-CALIFA（Sánchez et al. , 2021）检测像素样本的分辨标度关系的线性拟合参数。对于每个巡天，我们将参数转换为\(yr^{-1}\)和\(pc^{-2}\)单位，并转换为Chabrier初始质量函数。对于ALMaQUEST XI，我们展示了应用于全样本（FS）、控制样本（CS）和中心星暴样本（SB）的拟合参数。† 在最后一列中，剑标符号显示了每个巡天/样本中散布最小的关系。注意，来自EDGE-CALIFA的拟合并非使用本工作和ALMaQUEST XI中使用的ODR拟合程序获得。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Individual resolved Schmidt-Kennicutt relations for each of the ALMA CO-CAVITY VGs. The red contours show the distribution of the full sample of detected pixels. Coloured data points are the individual detected values for each galaxy, with the colour indicating the galactocentric distance normalised by the \(r_{50}\) represented by the vertical colour bar on the right side of the figure. In the upper-left corner of each panel, names in green are from galaxies whose rSK values do not deviate from the full-sample trend, in blue from those whose rSK values are above, and in orange from those below. The median error bars of the detected values are shown in the lower-right corner. We show the \(\Sigma_{{H_{2}}}\) upper limits with blue triangular markers, and the \(\Sigma_{{SFR}}\) upper limits with pink triangular markers. Non-detections in both variables are not shown. For the detected values, we perform an ODR fit without including upper limits nor errors, depicted with the black solid line when the fit was successful. All the values, including detected values with errors, and the upper limits, are fitted with LEO-Py pipeline, and the fit is depicted with a black dashed line. Galaxies without \(\Sigma_{{H_{2}}}\) detections do not have any linear fit.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：每个ALMA CO-CAVITY空洞星系的单独分辨施密特-肯尼卡特关系。红色等高线显示了全样本检测像素的分布。彩色数据点是每个星系的单独检测值，颜色表示以\(r_{50}\)归一化的星系中心距离，由图形右侧的垂直色条表示。每个面板的左上角，绿色名称表示其rSK值不偏离全样本趋势的星系，蓝色表示rSK值偏高的星系，橙色表示偏低的星系。检测值的中位数误差棒显示在右下角。我们用蓝色三角形标记显示\(\Sigma_{{H_{2}}}\)上限，用粉色三角形标记显示\(\Sigma_{{SFR}}\)上限。两个变量均未检测到的情况未显示。对于检测值，我们执行了不包含上限和误差的ODR拟合，拟合成功时用黑色实线表示。所有值，包括带误差的检测值和上限，均使用LEO-Py流程进行拟合，拟合结果用黑色虚线表示。没有\(\Sigma_{{H_{2}}}\)检测的星系没有任何线性拟合。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Resolved molecular gas main sequence for all ALMA CO-CAVITY VGs. The symbols and colours are equivalent to those of Fig. 2 . \(\Sigma_{\star}\) upper limits are depicted with yellow triangular markers.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：所有ALMA CO-CAVITY空洞星系的分辨分子气体主序。符号和颜色与图2相同。\(\Sigma_{\star}\)上限用黄色三角形标记表示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Resolved star-forming main sequence for all ALMA CO-CAVITY VGs. The symbols and colours are equivalent to those of Figs. 2 and 3 .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：所有ALMA CO-CAVITY空洞星系的分辨恒星形成主序。符号和颜色与图2和图3相同。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Running medians of resolved SRs for the rSK (left panel), rMGMS (mid panel) and rSFMS (right panel), for the 35 detected galaxies. In each panel, we show the individual detected pixels with grey data points, the running medians calculated for each galaxy individually with the coloured curves, and the one calculated for the full-sample distribution with the black curve. We apply a linear fit to the full-sample running medians depicted with the dashed black line. To calculate the running medians, we use 15 values to the left and to the right of each position (using more points to calculate the median is reducing the confidence of the results, since some galaxies do not have enough pixels detected in some bins) and we show the results for each relation over 20 positions across the horizontal axis. The shadowed region surrounding each curve is the median absolute deviation at each position. The vertical axis of each panel spans 4 dex to easily compare the galaxy-to-galaxy variations between resolved SRs.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：35个检测星系的分辨标度关系rSK（左面板）、rMGMS（中面板）和rSFMS（右面板）的运行中位数。在每个面板中，我们用灰色数据点显示单个检测像素，用彩色曲线显示为每个星系单独计算的运行中位数，用黑色曲线显示为全样本分布计算的运行中位数。我们对全样本运行中位数应用线性拟合，用黑色虚线表示。为了计算运行中位数，我们在每个位置的左侧和右侧各使用15个值（使用更多点来计算中位数会降低结果的置信度，因为某些星系在某些区间内没有足够的检测像素），并在水平轴上20个位置显示每个关系的结果。每条曲线周围的阴影区域是每个位置的中位数绝对偏差。每个面板的纵轴跨度为4 dex，以便于比较分辨标度关系之间的星系间差异。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Median deviations of individual galaxies in the resolved SRs with respect to the running median of the full-sample distribution of pixels. In the top panel we show the distributions of medians of \(\Delta rSK\) , \(\Delta rSFMS\) and \(\Delta rSFMS\) for the complete sample of 35 detected galaxies. In the bottom panel we show the same distributions for the truncated sample of 15 galaxies (see text for explanation). In each panel, we show the median value of the distributions with the red ( \(\Delta rSK\) ), purple ( \(\Delta rMGMS\) ), and blue ( \(\Delta rSFMS\) ) vertical lines. In the upper-right legend of each panel, we also include the standard deviation of each distribution.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：单个星系在分辨标度关系中的中位数偏差相对于全样本像素分布运行中位数的结果。在上方面板中，我们展示了35个检测星系完整样本的\(\Delta rSK\)、\(\Delta rSFMS\)和\(\Delta rSFMS\)中位数分布。在下方面板中，我们展示了15个星系截断样本（见文本解释）的相同分布。在每个面板中，我们用红色（\(\Delta rSK\)）、紫色（\(\Delta rMGMS\)）和蓝色（\(\Delta rSFMS\)）垂直线显示分布的中位数值。在每个面板的右上角图例中，我们还包含了每个分布的标准差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7 : Galaxy-by-galaxy offsets from the full-sample trends of the resolved SRs compared between each relation. In each panel the data points are the the median offsets, with the \({rSFMS-rMGMS}\) diagram in the left panel, the \({rSFMS-rSK}\) diagram in the mid panel, and the \({rSK-rMGMS}\) diagram in the right panel. The error bars are the median absolute deviation of each value. In red we highlight the 15 galaxies of the truncated sample (see text for explanation), and in yellow the other 20. The blue distribution in the background represents the deviations for the mock sample of 10 000 data points, with black contours depicting 5, 10, 20, 40, and 70% of inclusion. In each panel the horizontal and vertical black-dashed lines representing the positions of no offset at 0.0 dex, and with the dotted grey line the 1-to-1 relation.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：分辨标度关系中每个星系相对于全样本趋势的偏移量在各关系之间的比较。在每个面板中，数据点是中位数偏移量，左面板为\({rSFMS-rMGMS}\)图，中面板为\({rSFMS-rSK}\)图，右面板为\({rSK-rMGMS}\)图。误差棒是每个值的中位数绝对偏差。我们用红色突出显示15个截断样本（见文本解释）的星系，用黄色突出显示其他20个星系。背景中的蓝色分布代表10,000个数据点模拟样本的偏差，黑色等高线表示5%、10%、20%、40%和70%的包含水平。在每个面板中，水平和垂直黑色虚线表示0.0 dex的无偏移位置，灰色点线表示1:1关系。

title: The first dusty galaxies across $6 \lesssim z \lesssim 14$: Blue monsters, red monsters, and the bimodality of dust content in early galaxies
comment: 4 pages, 1 figure. Accepted for publication as a Letter in Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: JWST has revealed galaxies at $z>10$ with extremely blue UV-continuum slopes approaching $β_{\rm UV}\lesssim-2.4$, and low inferred dust contents. At similar redshifts, JWST and ALMA reveal dusty massive systems reaching $β_{\rm UV}\gtrsim-1$. We aim to explain blue monsters and red monsters at $z\gtrsim10$ as different outcomes of supernova dust retention in clustered star-forming systems and connect this bimodality to dusty massive galaxies at $z\simeq6$--7. We model dust removal in a cluster-dominated regime through cloud-scale mechanical blowout followed by breakout from stratified high-redshift disks. The shock-processed dust mass retained in the UV-attenuating layer is converted into a UV-continuum slope using absorption opacities derived from 3D hydrodynamical simulations of clustered supernovae in porous molecular clouds. In compact, gas-rich galaxies, efficient cloud blowout and disk breakout reduce the retained dust fraction to blue-monster levels, yielding $β_{\rm UV}\lesssim-2.4$. Larger stellar masses increase the retained dust column and produce red-monster-like systems with $β_{\rm UV}\gtrsim-1.5$, reaching $β_{\rm UV}\simeq-0.5$ when radiative losses weaken large-scale driving. The transition depends on whether clustered-supernova ejecta cross both the natal cloud and the galactic gas layer. Supernova dust production, shock processing, radiative losses, and mechanical venting can jointly explain UV-bright dust-poor galaxies and red dusty massive systems across $6\lesssim z\lesssim14$.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过超新星尘埃在星团主导的恒星形成系统中的保留机制，解释了JWST和ALMA在z>10观测到的极端蓝色(β_UV≲-2.4)和红色(β_UV≳-1)星系的双峰现象，并将其与z≃6-7的尘埃大质量星系联系起来。
AI.motivation: JWST揭示的高红移(z>10)星系存在极端蓝色UV连续谱斜率(β_UV≲-2.4)和低尘埃含量，而同时期JWST和ALMA又观测到高尘埃大质量星系(β_UV≳-1)，这种双峰现象缺乏统一解释。

artifacts.abstract_zh: JWST揭示了红移z>10的星系具有极蓝的紫外连续谱斜率，接近β_UV≲-2.4，且尘埃含量较低。在类似红移处，JWST和ALMA揭示了尘埃丰富的大质量系统，其β_UV≳-1。我们旨在将z≳10处的蓝怪兽和红怪兽解释为星暴星团系统中超新星尘埃保留的不同结果，并将这种双峰现象与z≃6–7处的尘埃丰富大质量星系联系起来。我们通过云尺度机械吹出以及随后从分层的高红移盘中的突破，模拟了星团主导区域中的尘埃移除。利用从多孔分子云中星团超新星的3D流体动力学模拟导出的吸收不透明度，将保留在紫外消光层中的激波处理尘埃质量转换为紫外连续谱斜率。在致密、富含气体的星系中，高效的云吹出和盘突破将保留的尘埃分数降低至蓝怪兽水平，产生β_UV≲-2.4。更大的恒星质量增加了保留的尘埃柱密度，并产生类似红怪兽的系统，其β_UV≳-1.5，当辐射损失削弱大尺度驱动时，β_UV达到≃-0.5。这种转变取决于星团超新星抛射物是否同时穿过诞生云和星系气体层。超新星尘埃产生、激波处理、辐射损失和机械通风可以共同解释6≲z≲14范围内紫外明亮贫尘星系和红色尘埃大质量星系。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：超新星尘埃产生、激波处理、辐射损失和机械通风可联合解释6≲z≲14范围内紫外明亮贫尘星系和红色尘埃大质量星系的双峰现象。

title: Outflows in the Early Universe: Neutral gas Absorption in Galaxies at z > 3 from low-resolution JWST Spectroscopy
summary: Recent JWST/NIRSpec observations have shown that Na I D absorption tracing neutral gas outflows is widespread in massive galaxies at Cosmic Noon ($z\sim2$-$3$), but their prevalence at higher redshift remains largely unexplored. Here we investigate whether similar outflows are already in place during the first 2 Gyr of cosmic history ($z>3$), using a sample of 811 galaxies at $3<z<7$ from the public DAWN JWST Archive and the Mirage or Miracle survey, with secure spectroscopic redshifts and continuum SNR$>5$ in their JWST/NIRSpec PRISM low-resolution spectra ($R\sim100$). We derived physical properties and star formation histories via Prospector SED fitting and isolated the Na I D feature in each spectrum by subtracting the best-fit stellar continuum. We detect an excess of Na I D absorption in 20 galaxies, almost all at $3<z<5$ with stellar mass $>10^{10} M_\odot$, an overall detection fraction of $\sim2.5\%$. The detection fraction rises steeply with stellar mass and quiescence, reaching $\sim11\%$ among the most massive galaxies and $\sim43\%$ among massive quenched systems. The Na I D equivalent widths are large, spanning 4 to 16 Angstrom, and are highest in dusty star-forming galaxies. In previous medium-resolution observations, EWs above 5 Angstrom were mostly found in outflowing gas; we thus interpret our detections as mostly tracing neutral outflows, despite the lack of kinematic information at PRISM resolution. A stacking analysis confirms these trends and provides average Na I D EWs for different subsamples. Under conservative assumptions, we estimate mass outflow rates of 4 to 12 $M_\odot$ yr$^{-1}$, exceeding the current star formation rate for about 30% of the detected galaxies. We conclude that neutral outflows are likely already present and important in massive galaxies during the first 2 Gyr of cosmic history.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST/NIRSpec数据，对红移3<z<7的811个星系进行Na I D吸收线分析，发现约2.5%的星系（主要在大质量星系中）存在中性气体外流，质量外流率为4-12 M⊙/yr，表明在宇宙历史最初20亿年内，中性外流已在巨质量星系中普遍存在并发挥重要作用。
AI.motivation: 先前JWST/NIRSpec观测已显示中性气体外流在宇宙正午(z~2-3)的大质量星系中普遍存在，但更高红移(z>3)中外流的普遍性尚不清楚，本文旨在探究宇宙历史最初20亿年内类似外流是否已经存在。
AI.method: 使用DAWN JWST Archive和Mirage or Miracle巡天中811个3<z<7星系的JWST/NIRSpec PRISM低分辨率光谱(R~100)，通过Prospector SED拟合推导物理性质和星族历史，减去最佳拟合恒星连续谱后分离Na I D特征，并进行堆叠分析。
AI.result: 在20个星系中探测到Na I D吸收过强，主要集中在3<z<5、恒星质量>10^10 M⊙的星系中，整体探测率约2.5%。探测率随恒星质量和静止性质急剧上升，在大质量星系中达~11%，在大质量淬灭星系中达~43%。Na I D等效宽度为4-16 Å，在尘埃恒星形成星系中最高。质量外流率为4-12 M⊙/yr，约30%探测星系的外流率超过当前恒星形成率。
AI.conclusion: 中性外流很可能在宇宙历史最初20亿年内就已存在于大质量星系中，并发挥重要作用。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 近期JWST/NIRSpec观测表明，在宇宙正午（$z\sim2$-$3$）的大质量星系中，追踪中性气体外流的Na I D吸收线普遍存在，但在更高红移处的普遍性仍很大程度上未被探索。本文利用来自公共DAWN JWST档案库以及Mirage或Miracle巡天的811个$3<z<7$星系样本，这些星系具有可靠的光谱红移，且其JWST/NIRSpec PRISM低分辨率光谱（$R\sim100$）中的连续谱信噪比大于5，研究了在宇宙历史最初20亿年（$z>3$）内是否已存在类似的外流。我们通过Prospector SED拟合推导了物理性质和恒星形成历史，并通过减去最佳拟合恒星连续谱来分离每个光谱中的Na I D特征。我们在20个星系中探测到Na I D吸收过剩，这些星系几乎全部位于$3<z<5$且恒星质量$>10^{10} M_\odot$，整体探测率约为$2.5\%$。探测率随恒星质量和静止性急剧上升，在最庞大星系中达到约$11\%$，在庞大静止星系中达到约$43\%$。Na I D等值宽度较大，范围为4至16埃，在尘埃恒星形成星系中最高。在先前的中等分辨率观测中，等值宽度高于5埃主要出现在外流气体中；因此，尽管缺乏PRISM分辨率下的运动学信息，我们将探测结果主要解释为追踪中性外流。叠加分析证实了这些趋势，并提供了不同子样本的平均Na I D等值宽度。在保守假设下，我们估计质量外流率为4至12 $M_\odot$ yr$^{-1}$，对于约30%的探测星系，该值超过了当前的恒星形成率。我们得出结论：中性外流很可能在宇宙历史最初20亿年内就已存在于大质量星系中，并发挥重要作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，中性外流很可能在宇宙历史最初20亿年内就已存在于大质量星系中，并发挥重要作用。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Best-fit SED and derived SFH. Top panel : The observed NIRSpec prism spectrum (blue) and photometric data (red diamonds) are shown against the best-fit model from prospector (red line) for the source rubies-uds23-v4-prism-clear-4233-140707 . The best-fit model shown is regenerated without emission lines, to display the underlying stellar continuum. The data span from the rest-frame UV to the near-infrared. Significant absorption lines (e.g., Ca II, Na I D) and emission lines (e.g., [O III], H \(\alpha\) ) are marked. The inset shows a detailed view of the Na I D feature. Middle panel : The residuals of the fit (Observation/Bestfit). Bottom panel : The non-parametric SFH reconstructed from the fit. The solid line shows the median SFR at each time bin, and the shaded region marks the 68% confidence interval.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：最佳拟合SED和推导的SFH。上方面板：展示了源rubies-uds23-v4-prism-clear-4233-140707的观测NIRSpec棱镜光谱（蓝色）和测光数据（红色菱形），以及来自prospector的最佳拟合模型（红线）。所示的最佳拟合模型是在无发射线情况下重新生成的，以显示底层恒星连续谱。数据覆盖从静止系紫外到近红外。标记了显著的吸收线（例如，Ca II, Na I D）和发射线（例如，[O III], H \(\alpha\)）。插图中显示了Na I D特征的详细视图。中间面板：拟合的残差（观测值/最佳拟合值）。下方面板：从拟合重建的非参数SFH。实线显示每个时间区间的中值SFR，阴影区域标记68%置信区间。

Square symbols identify galaxies in the golden sample (i.e., with robust Na I D detection), red squares mark systems below the Main Sequence, while blue squares mark systems on or above the Main Sequence.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：母样本中星系性质作为EW gas的函数，即由气体吸收（正EW值）或发射（负EW值）导致的Na I D等值宽度过剩。面板从上到下显示：恒星质量、比恒星形成率（\(\log{sSFR}\)）、尘埃消光（\(A_{V}\)）、来自恒星模型的预期等值宽度（\(EW_{{stars}}\)）以及组装时间（\(t_{90}\)）。方形符号标识黄金样本中的星系（即具有可靠Na I D探测），红色方形标记主序以下的系统，蓝色方形标记主序上或以上的系统。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7 : Left: Continuum-normalized mean stacks (black) with \(1\sigma\) uncertainty (blue) for different subsamples: the golden sample (i.e., with robust Na I D detection), galaxies above and below the MS in the golden sample, high-extinction massive galaxies and high-extinction massive galaxies which are not part of the golden sample. Right: Zoom-in of the Na I D doublet for each of the stacks. Red dashed lines show the best-fit models. The \(EW_{gas}\) measured from the continuum-normalized stack, and the mean stellar model \(EW_{\star}\) are listed in each panel. Vertical lines mark the He I and Na I D wavelengths.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：左图：不同子样本的连续谱归一化平均叠加（黑色）及\(1\sigma\)不确定性（蓝色）：黄金样本（即具有可靠Na I D探测）、黄金样本中主序以上和以下的星系、高消光大质量星系以及不属于黄金样本的高消光大质量星系。右图：每个叠加的Na I D双线放大图。红色虚线显示最佳拟合模型。每个面板中列出了从连续谱归一化叠加测量的\(EW_{gas}\)和平均恒星模型\(EW_{\star}\)。垂直线标记He I和Na I D波长。

title: Gravitational Lensing Predictions from Wave Simulations of Fuzzy Dark Matter
summary: In the cold dark matter paradigm, ultra-light particles are emerging as strong contenders to conventional massive particles. A unique prediction of dark matter comprising such ultra-light particles, known as fuzzy dark matter (FDM), is the presence of strong density modulations throughout galactic halos due to wave interference, which -- when approximated by a Gaussian random field (GRF) -- have been proposed to account for the inability to reproduce the observed positions (when measured at sufficient precisions) and flux ratios of multiply-lensed images of quasars. Here, we predict for the first time the properties of gravitationally lensed images generated from 3-D density fields obtained by wave simulations that directly evolve the Schrödinger--Poisson equations. Using a novel framework to project these evolved density fields along various axes of the 3-D halo, we obtain the distribution of perturbations to the positions of lensed images. As an exacting test, we find that particles of mass $10^{-22}$ eV can reproduce the positions of the quadruply-lensed radio jets in system HS 0810+2554 to a level better than that of either the GRF approximation or, to a greater extent, an NFW best-fit solution, both of which rely on accurately capturing the global 3-D density field of dark matter halos. Our work highlights the importance of wave simulations for making accurate FDM lensing predictions and the potential for high-resolution observations of lensed systems to serve as a direct probe of the nature of dark matter.

AI.tldr: 本文通过波模拟（直接求解薛定谔-泊松方程）生成三维密度场，首次预测了模糊暗物质（FDM）的引力透镜效应。研究发现，质量$10^{-22}$ eV的FDM粒子能比高斯随机场（GRF）近似和NFW最佳拟合更好地再现HS 0810+2554系统中四重透镜射电喷流的位置，凸显了波模拟对精确FDM透镜预测的重要性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在冷暗物质范式中，超轻粒子正成为传统大质量粒子的有力竞争者。由这种超轻粒子构成的暗物质，即模糊暗物质（FDM），其独特预测是：由于波干涉，整个星系晕中存在强烈的密度调制——当用高斯随机场（GRF）近似时，这种调制被认为可以解释无法在足够精度下再现多透镜类星体图像观测位置和流量比的问题。本文首次基于直接演化薛定谔-泊松方程的波模拟生成的三维密度场，预测了引力透镜图像的性质。通过一种新框架将这些演化的密度场沿三维晕的不同轴投影，我们获得了透镜图像位置扰动的分布。作为严格检验，我们发现质量为 $10^{-22}$ eV 的粒子能够再现系统 HS 0810+2554 中四透镜射电喷流的位置，其精度优于 GRF 近似，更优于 NFW 最佳拟合解，而这两种方法都依赖于准确捕捉暗物质晕的全局三维密度场。我们的工作强调了波模拟对于做出准确 FDM 透镜预测的重要性，以及高分辨率透镜系统观测作为直接探测暗物质本性探针的潜力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，本研究的结论是：波模拟对于做出准确的模糊暗物质（FDM）透镜预测至关重要，并且高分辨率透镜系统观测有潜力成为直接探测暗物质本性的探针。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Projected density field of an evolved fuzzy dark matter halo obtained from the Schrödinger–Poisson simulation ( \(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}\,{eV}\) ). From left to right, the panels show the convergence \(\kappa_{FDM}\) (projected surface mass density relative to the critical density), its elliptical-annular mean \(\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle\) , and the relative residual between the total and mean convergence \((\kappa_{FDM}-\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle)/\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle\) . The ellipticity and position angle of the annuli are inferred from the projected convergence distribution. The white contours correspond to \(\kappa_{FDM}\sim 0.45\) and \(0.60\) , respectively, and highlight the density fluctuations around the critical curve, which is shown in red. For visualization, all maps are clipped at their respective 95th-percentile values. See Section VI.4 for further discussion.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：从薛定谔-泊松模拟（ \(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}\,{eV}\) ）获得的演化模糊暗物质晕的投影密度场。从左到右，面板分别显示会聚度 \(\kappa_{FDM}\) （相对于临界密度的投影面质量密度）、其椭圆环形平均值 \(\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle\) ，以及总会聚度与平均值之间的相对残差 \((\kappa_{FDM}-\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle)/\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle\) 。环的椭圆率和位置角由投影会聚度分布推断得出。白色等高线分别对应 \(\kappa_{FDM}\sim 0.45\) 和 \(0.60\) ，并突出显示了临界曲线（以红色显示）周围的密度涨落。为便于可视化，所有地图均在其各自的第95百分位值处截断。进一步讨论见第六节第四小节。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Spherically averaged radial density profiles of the evolved fuzzy dark matter halos. The blue and orange curves correspond to particle masses of \(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}\,{eV}\) and \(m_{\psi}=10^{-23}\,{eV}\) , respectively. The blue and orange dotted curves show the corresponding best-fitting soliton profiles in the inner halo regions (Schive et al. , 2014b ) . The black dashed and solid curves show the best-fitting NFW profiles for the \(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}\,{eV}\) and \(m_{\psi}=10^{-23}\,{eV}\) halos, respectively, obtained using only the radial data beyond the effective Einstein radius.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：演化模糊暗物质晕的球平均径向密度轮廓。蓝色和橙色曲线分别对应粒子质量 \(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}\,{eV}\) 和 \(m_{\psi}=10^{-23}\,{eV}\) 。蓝色和橙色虚线曲线显示了内部晕区域中相应的最佳拟合孤子轮廓（Schive 等人，2014b）。黑色虚线和实线曲线分别显示了 \(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}\,{eV}\) 和 \(m_{\psi}=10^{-23}\,{eV}\) 晕的最佳拟合 NFW 轮廓，仅使用了有效爱因斯坦半径之外的径向数据。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Probability distributions of the image-position anomaly \(A\) . (a) Schrödinger–Poisson FDM simulations with \(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}~{eV}\) . (b) GRF-based FDM density realizations constructed on top of the best-fitting NFW model. (c) Schrödinger–Poisson FDM simulations with \(m_{\psi}=10^{-23}~{eV}\) . The blue and red histograms show the normalized distributions for the two radio sources, radio1 and radio2, respectively, while the solid curves denote the corresponding kernel-density-estimation (KDE) fits. The blue and red vertical dashed lines indicate the position anomalies predicted by the best-fitting smooth NFW model for radio1 and radio2, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：图像位置异常 \(A\) 的概率分布。(a) 具有 \(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}~{eV}\) 的薛定谔-泊松 FDM 模拟。(b) 基于最佳拟合 NFW 模型构建的 GRF 基 FDM 密度实现。(c) 具有 \(m_{\psi}=10^{-23}~{eV}\) 的薛定谔-泊松 FDM 模拟。蓝色和红色直方图分别显示了两个射电源 radio1 和 radio2 的归一化分布，而实线曲线则显示了相应的核密度估计（KDE）拟合。蓝色和红色垂直虚线分别表示最佳拟合平滑 NFW 模型对 radio1 和 radio2 预测的位置异常。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Predicted and observed lensed image positions for the two radio components of HS 0810+2554. The central panel shows the full image configuration, while the surrounding panels zoom into the individual images. To avoid visual overcrowding, only the 300 best-matching realizations with the smallest position anomaly \(A\) are shown, with the images denoted by colored points. The black solid ellipses denote the \(3\sigma\) measurement uncertainties of the image positions. The NFW-predicted image positions and their corresponding \(3\sigma\) uncertainties obtained from MCMC simulations, adopted from Liu et al. ( 2024 ) , are shown as red + symbols. The black \(\times\) symbols denote the best-matching GRF image positions, while the red \(\blacktriangle\) symbols denote the best-matching S–P simulated image positions. The green curve denotes the critical curve of the best-fitting elliptical NFW model for HS 0810+2554.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：HS 0810+2554 两个射电分量的预测和观测透镜图像位置。中心面板显示了完整的图像配置，而周围面板则放大了各个图像。为避免视觉拥挤，仅显示了具有最小位置异常 \(A\) 的 300 个最佳匹配实现，图像用彩色点表示。黑色实线椭圆表示图像位置的 \(3\sigma\) 测量不确定度。NFW 预测的图像位置及其相应的 \(3\sigma\) 不确定度（来自 MCMC 模拟，采用自 Liu 等人（2024））以红色 + 符号显示。黑色 \(\times\) 符号表示最佳匹配的 GRF 图像位置，而红色 \(\blacktriangle\) 符号表示最佳匹配的 S–P 模拟图像位置。绿色曲线表示 HS 0810+2554 的最佳拟合椭圆 NFW 模型的临界曲线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Schematic illustration of the reduced matching procedure. (a) The line of sight is fixed along the \(z\) -axis, while the principal axis of the three-dimensional density field is rotated to representative directions in the positive \(xz\) plane. (b) Four-image configurations related by translation, rotation, or reflection are treated as geometrically equivalent. In the actual calculation, all six pairwise distances among the four images are used, including the two diagonal distances not explicitly labelled in the schematic figure. See Section VI.2 for further discussion.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：简化匹配过程的示意图。(a) 视线沿 \(z\) 轴固定，而三维密度场的主轴旋转到正 \(xz\) 平面内的代表性方向。(b) 通过平移、旋转或反射相关的四图像配置被视为几何等效。在实际计算中，使用了四个图像之间的所有六个成对距离，包括示意图中未明确标记的两个对角线距离。进一步讨论见第六节第二小节。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Annular rms amplitudes of the projected convergence fluctuations for the Schrödinger–Poisson (S–P) and Gaussian random field (GRF) realizations. The left and right panels show the fractional rms, \(\langle(\delta\kappa/\kappa_{ref})^{2}\rangle^{1/2}\) , and the absolute rms, \(\langle(\delta\kappa)^{2}\rangle^{1/2}\) , respectively. Here, \(\delta\kappa=\kappa-\kappa_{ref}\) , with \(\kappa_{ref}=\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle_{ell}\) for the S–P realization and \(\kappa_{ref}=\kappa_{NFW}\) for the GRF realization. The vertical dashed lines mark the effective Einstein radius. See Section VI.3 for further discussion.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：薛定谔-泊松（S–P）和高斯随机场（GRF）实现的投影会聚度涨落的环形均方根振幅。左图和右图分别显示了分数均方根 \(\langle(\delta\kappa/\kappa_{ref})^{2}\rangle^{1/2}\) 和绝对均方根 \(\langle(\delta\kappa)^{2}\rangle^{1/2}\) 。这里， \(\delta\kappa=\kappa-\kappa_{ref}\) ，对于 S–P 实现， \(\kappa_{ref}=\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle_{ell}\) ；对于 GRF 实现， \(\kappa_{ref}=\kappa_{NFW}\) 。垂直虚线标记了有效爱因斯坦半径。进一步讨论见第六节第三小节。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Gaussianity tests for the standardized residual fluctuations in three representative annuli. To match the adopted de Broglie wavelength, \(\lambda_{dB}\sim 120\,{pc}\) , each annulus is assigned a radial width of \(\Delta R=120\,{pc}\) . For each annulus, the left panel compares the probability-density distributions of the standardized residuals from the fuzzy dark matter (FDM) and Gaussian random field (GRF) realizations with the standard normal distribution, \(\mathcal{N}(0,1)\) , while the right panel shows the corresponding normal quantile–quantile (Q–Q) plot. The reported statistics are the sample size \(n\) , skewness \(S\) , kurtosis \(K\) , Kolmogorov–Smirnov (K–S) statistic \(D\) , and its associated \(p\) -value. The Schrödinger–Poisson FDM residuals are broadly consistent with Gaussian statistics within the selected annuli and exhibit good agreement with the GRF realization. See Section VI.3 for further discussion.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：三个代表性环中标准化残差涨落的高斯性检验。为匹配所采用的德布罗意波长 \(\lambda_{dB}\sim 120\,{pc}\) ，每个环被赋予径向宽度 \(\Delta R=120\,{pc}\) 。对于每个环，左图比较了来自模糊暗物质（FDM）和高斯随机场（GRF）实现的标准化残差的概率密度分布与标准正态分布 \(\mathcal{N}(0,1)\) ，而右图显示了相应的正态分位数-分位数（Q–Q）图。报告的统计量包括样本量 \(n\) 、偏度 \(S\) 、峰度 \(K\) 、柯尔莫哥洛夫-斯米尔诺夫（K–S）统计量 \(D\) 及其相关的 \(p\) 值。所选环内的薛定谔-泊松 FDM 残差与高斯统计量基本一致，并与 GRF 实现表现出良好的一致性。进一步讨论见第六节第三小节。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Extension of Figure 1 ; see Section VI.4 and Section VI.5 for further discussion. Panel set (a) shows the \(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}\,{eV}\) Schrödinger–Poisson (S–P) realization: the projected convergence field \(\kappa_{FDM}\) , its elliptical-annular mean \(\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle\) , and the corresponding fractional residual \((\kappa_{FDM}-\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle)/\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle\) . Panel set (b) shows the conventional Gaussian random field (GRF) realization based on the NFW model for \(\lambda_{dB}\sim 120\,{pc}\) : the total convergence field \(\kappa_{FDM}\) , the smooth NFW reference field \(\kappa_{NFW}\) , and the fractional residual \((\kappa_{FDM}-\kappa_{NFW})/\kappa_{NFW}\) . Panel set (c) shows a GRF realization constructed from the S–P result, for which the elliptical-annular mean of the selected S–P convergence map defines the smooth component and the spatially varying fluctuation amplitude is derived from the corresponding three-dimensional S–P density field. The three columns show the resulting total convergence field \(\kappa_{FDM}\) , its S–P-derived elliptical-annular mean \(\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle\) , and the corresponding fractional residual \((\kappa_{FDM}-\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle)/\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle\) , respectively. The white contours correspond to \(\kappa_{FDM}\sim 0.45\) and \(0.60\) , respectively, and highlight the density fluctuations around the critical curve, which is shown in red. For visualization, each convergence map is capped at its 95th-percentile value, with all values above this threshold assigned the threshold value. Across all three panel sets, the fractional-residual maps are displayed using a common symmetric color scale whose limits are set by the smallest of their individual maximum absolute displayed values, thereby facilitating direct comparison.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：图1的扩展；进一步讨论见第六节第四小节和第六节第五小节。面板组 (a) 显示了 \(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}\,{eV}\) 薛定谔-泊松（S–P）实现：投影会聚度场 \(\kappa_{FDM}\) 、其椭圆环形平均值 \(\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle\) 以及相应的分数残差 \((\kappa_{FDM}-\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle)/\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle\) 。面板组 (b) 显示了基于 NFW 模型（ \(\lambda_{dB}\sim 120\,{pc}\) ）的传统高斯随机场（GRF）实现：总会聚度场 \(\kappa_{FDM}\) 、平滑 NFW 参考场 \(\kappa_{NFW}\) 以及分数残差 \((\kappa_{FDM}-\kappa_{NFW})/\kappa_{NFW}\) 。面板组 (c) 显示了根据 S–P 结果构建的 GRF 实现，其中所选 S–P 会聚度图的椭圆环形平均值定义了平滑分量，而空间变化的涨落幅度则来自相应的三维 S–P 密度场。三列分别显示了产生的总会聚度场 \(\kappa_{FDM}\) 、其 S–P 导出的椭圆环形平均值 \(\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle\) 以及相应的分数残差 \((\kappa_{FDM}-\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle)/\langle\kappa_{FDM}\rangle\) 。白色等高线分别对应 \(\kappa_{FDM}\sim 0.45\) 和 \(0.60\) ，并突出显示了临界曲线（以红色显示）周围的密度涨落。为便于可视化，每个会聚度图在其第95百分位值处截断，所有高于此阈值的值均被赋值为该阈值。在所有三个面板组中，分数残差图使用共同的对称色标显示，其极限由它们各自最大绝对显示值中的最小值设定，从而便于直接比较。
